prompt: Starting a new REST API backend for a mobile app (iOS + Android). Team is 2 developers — both know Python well and have some TypeScript experience. Expected to handle maybe 50k users in year 1. We need user auth, push notifications, and a few CRUD endpoints. What stack and database should we use?
assertions: Recommends FastAPI (or Django REST) given the Python-first team
Recommends a managed auth provider for the auth requirement
Recommends a managed database service (Supabase, Railway, or Neon)
Recommends a specific ORM (SQLAlchemy or SQLModel)
Addresses push notifications (e.g., via Firebase FCM or similar)
